subject: Product Update:Automate Hover & Right-Click
body_preview:
[BrowserAct]

Hi there,

Web automation keeps running into the same wall.

Hover menus. Right-click actions. Hidden UI states. The stuff that no-code tools usually can't touch.

We just released v1.27.0 — and these interactions aren't blocking you anymore.

What's New

✅ Hover & Right-Click Nodes
Automate hidden menus, context actions, and dynamic elements. No code required. If a human can interact with it, BrowserAct can now automate it.

✅ All Tasks in One View
The Tasks page n

subject: Launch Week 2, Day 1: Agentic Search is live
body_preview:
Hi, Lennert here from Airweave.

Launch Week 2 is here. Five days, five launches. Here's the first one.

Introducing Agentic Search.

Your agent can now spin up a sub-agent that runs multiple search strategies in parallel and refines the results until it has the best answer. Semantic search, keyword search, graph traversal, self-correction, and reranking. All fully autonomous.

Works across 50+ sources: Notion, Slack, Linear, Drive, Gmail, GitHub, Airtable, and more.

One endpoint, ava

subject: Launch Week 2, Day 2: Airweave Connect is live
body_preview:
We just released Airweave Connect.

Your users need to connect their data sources to your app. Now they can do it themselves with a single embeddable widget. No auth UI to build.


Try it in our Connect Playground before writing a line of code. Configure sessions, customize the theme, and export ready-to-use snippets:

 * app.airweave.ai http://app.airweave.ai
   

You add a button, they click it, their data starts syncing. Sync from 50 sources like Slack, GitHub, Google Drive, Notion,

subject: Your Kilo balance now unlocks KiloClaw 🦞
body_preview:
Hi there,

We wanted to make sure you knew about KiloClaw — our hosted AI assistant (based on OpenClaw), already available to you as a Kilo Code user.

Here's the short version:
• Runs in the cloud, always on

• Assign tasks via Slack, Discord, Telegram or the web — it works in the background while you do other things
• Uses the same AI inference balance you already have in Kilo Code
• Launch in one click

Try KiloClaw Now 🦀 ( https://app.kilo.ai/claw )

Regards,

Job

P.S. Any

subject: We're going live with the Google AI Studio team
body_preview:
Hey Kayhan,

Google dropped a major AI Studio update last week: the Antigravity agent paired with Firebase, so you can go from a plain-English prompt to a deployed app with auth, a database, and a backend, all inside one browser tab.

To kick it off, we're bringing in the two people who know it better than anyone.

Logan Kilpatrick, head of AI Studio at Google DeepMind, and Ammaar Reshi, who leads product and design for AI Studio, are joining us live on April 1st to showcase the new tools
